author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Core enum definitions, DB layer (rusqlite ToSql/FromSql), models, issue_file, checkpoint, compaction, hydration, shared_writer, and server handlers all converted and tested. Remaining: ~46 errors in CLI commands (tree, import, archive, next) and TUI (issues_tab, milestones_tab) display code. These are all string comparisons and display formatting — mechanical fixes.
